flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Sampson Community College fell 12% between 2006 and 2009 (20.4% → 17.9%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Sampson Community College fell 28% between 2000 and 2003 ($2.6k → $1.9k).
